action_mappings.unlink_reason_code_from_case: unlink reason code {} from chargeback case {}

action_mappings_indef.unlink_dispute_record_from_case: unlink a dispute record {} from a chargeback case {}

predicate_mappings.case_external_reference_validated: {} has an external reference {} that is validated
predicate_mappings.case_source_transaction_candidate: {} is a candidate for the source transaction {}
predicate_mappings.case_accounting_batch_candidate: {} is a candidate for the accounting batch {}
predicate_mappings.case_clearing_instruction_candidate: {} is a candidate for the clearing instruction {}
predicate_mappings.case_merchant_account_candidate: {} is a candidate for the merchant account {}
predicate_mappings.case_dispute_record_candidate: {} is a candidate for the dispute record {}
predicate_mappings.case_evidence_document_candidate: {} is a candidate for the evidence document {}
predicate_mappings.case_reason_code_candidate: {} is a candidate for the reason code {}
predicate_mappings.case_work_item_assigned: {} is assigned to the chargeback case {}
predicate_mappings.case_external_reference_link_allowed: the chargeback case {} allows an external reference link {}

preconditions: I can only activate a chargeback case A if it is not the case that A is active and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I activate a chargeback case A, it is the case that A is active

link_source_transaction_to_case.description: link a source transaction B to a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only link a source transaction B to a chargeback case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and A is a candidate for the source transaction B
I can only link a source transaction B to a chargeback case A if it is not the case that A has a match
effects: Once I link a source transaction B to a chargeback case A, it is the case that A has the source transaction B and A has a match
Once I link a source transaction B to a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_source_transaction_from_case.description: unlink a source transaction B from a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a source transaction B from a chargeback case A if it is the case that A has the source transaction B
I can only unlink a source transaction B from a chargeback case A if it is not the case that A is accounting aligned and it is not the case that A is resolution eligible
effects: Once I unlink a source transaction B from a chargeback case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I unlink a source transaction B from a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that A has the source transaction B and it is not the case anymore that A has a match and it is not the case anymore that A is assigned for investigation and it is not the case anymore that the evidence for A is verified and it is not the case anymore that A is pending approval and it is not the case anymore that A is resolved and it is not the case anymore that the chargeback case A requires follow up

assign_work_item_to_case.description: assign a work item B to a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only assign a work item B to a chargeback case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available
effects: Once I assign a work item B to a chargeback case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the chargeback case A
Once I assign a work item B to a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_work_item_from_case.description: release a work item B from a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only release a work item B from a chargeback case A if it is the case that B is assigned to the chargeback case A
effects: Once I release a work item B from a chargeback case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a work item B from a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the chargeback case A

record_investigation_assignment.description: record investigation assignment for a chargeback case A with a work item B
preconditions: I can only record investigation assignment for a chargeback case A with a work item B if it is the case that A is active and A has a match and B is assigned to the chargeback case A
I can only record investigation assignment for a chargeback case A with a work item B if it is not the case that A is assigned for investigation
effects: Once I record investigation assignment for a chargeback case A with a work item B, it is the case that A is assigned for investigation

assign_analyst_to_case.description: assign an analyst B to a chargeback case A for investigation
preconditions: I can only assign an analyst B to a chargeback case A for investigation if it is the case that A is active and A has a match and B is available
I can only assign an analyst B to a chargeback case A for investigation if it is not the case that A is assigned for investigation
effects: Once I assign an analyst B to a chargeback case A for investigation, it is the case that A is assigned for investigation and A is pending approval
Once I assign an analyst B to a chargeback case A for investigation, it is not the case anymore that B is available

record_approver_attestation.description: record attestation from an approver C for a work item B in a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only record attestation from an approver C for a work item B in a chargeback case A if it is the case that A is assigned for investigation and A has a match and B is assigned to the chargeback case A and C is available
I can only record attestation from an approver C for a work item B in a chargeback case A if it is not the case that the evidence for A is verified
effects: Once I record attestation from an approver C for a work item B in a chargeback case A, it is the case that the evidence for A is verified
Once I record attestation from an approver C for a work item B in a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that A is pending approval

record_external_reference_attestation.description: record attestation for a chargeback case A using an external reference B
preconditions: I can only record attestation for a chargeback case A using an external reference B if it is the case that A has a match and A has an external reference B that is validated
I can only record attestation for a chargeback case A using an external reference B if it is not the case that the evidence for A is verified
effects: Once I record attestation for a chargeback case A using an external reference B, it is the case that the evidence for A is verified
Once I record attestation for a chargeback case A using an external reference B, it is not the case anymore that A is pending approval

link_clearing_instruction_to_case.description: link a clearing instruction B to a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only link a clearing instruction B to a chargeback case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and A is a candidate for the clearing instruction B
effects: Once I link a clearing instruction B to a chargeback case A, it is the case that A has the clearing instruction B
Once I link a clearing instruction B to a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_clearing_instruction_from_case.description: unlink a clearing instruction B from a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a clearing instruction B from a chargeback case A if it is the case that A has the clearing instruction B
effects: Once I unlink a clearing instruction B from a chargeback case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a clearing instruction B from a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that A has the clearing instruction B

link_merchant_account_to_case.description: link a merchant account B to a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only link a merchant account B to a chargeback case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and A is a candidate for the merchant account B
effects: Once I link a merchant account B to a chargeback case A, it is the case that A has the merchant account B
Once I link a merchant account B to a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_merchant_account_from_case.description: unlink a merchant account B from a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a merchant account B from a chargeback case A if it is the case that A has the merchant account B
effects: Once I unlink a merchant account B from a chargeback case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a merchant account B from a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that A has the merchant account B

link_dispute_record_to_case.description: link a dispute record B to a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only link a dispute record B to a chargeback case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and A is a candidate for the dispute record B
effects: Once I link a dispute record B to a chargeback case A, it is the case that A has the dispute record B
Once I link a dispute record B to a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_dispute_record_from_case.description: unlink a dispute record B from a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a dispute record B from a chargeback case A if it is the case that A has the dispute record B
effects: Once I unlink a dispute record B from a chargeback case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a dispute record B from a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that A has the dispute record B

link_reason_code_to_case.description: link a reason code B to a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only link a reason code B to a chargeback case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and A is a candidate for the reason code B
effects: Once I link a reason code B to a chargeback case A, it is the case that A has the reason code B
Once I link a reason code B to a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_reason_code_from_case.description: unlink a reason code B from a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a reason code B from a chargeback case A if it is the case that A has the reason code B
effects: Once I unlink a reason code B from a chargeback case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a reason code B from a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that A has the reason code B

validate_accounting_alignment_with_batch.description: validate accounting alignment of a chargeback case A with an accounting batch B using a clearing instruction C and a merchant account D
preconditions: I can only validate accounting alignment of a chargeback case A with an accounting batch B using a clearing instruction C and a merchant account D if it is the case that A has a match and A has the clearing instruction C and A has the merchant account D and B is available and A is a candidate for the accounting batch B
I can only validate accounting alignment of a chargeback case A with an accounting batch B using a clearing instruction C and a merchant account D if it is not the case that A is accounting aligned
effects: Once I validate accounting alignment of a chargeback case A with an accounting batch B using a clearing instruction C and a merchant account D, it is the case that A has the accounting batch B and A is accounting aligned
Once I validate accounting alignment of a chargeback case A with an accounting batch B using a clearing instruction C and a merchant account D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

validate_accounting_with_dispute_and_evi.description: validate accounting of a chargeback case A with an accounting batch B, a dispute record C, and an evidence document D
preconditions: I can only validate accounting of a chargeback case A with an accounting batch B, a dispute record C, and an evidence document D if it is the case that A has a match and A has the dispute record C and D is available and B is available and A is a candidate for the accounting batch B and A is a candidate for the evidence document D
I can only validate accounting of a chargeback case A with an accounting batch B, a dispute record C, and an evidence document D if it is not the case that A is accounting aligned
effects: Once I validate accounting of a chargeback case A with an accounting batch B, a dispute record C, and an evidence document D, it is the case that A has the accounting batch B and A is accounting aligned and the chargeback case A requires follow up and A is pending approval

Once I validate accounting of a chargeback case A with an accounting batch B, a dispute record C, and an evidence document D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

confirm_accounting_and_clear_followup.description: confirm accounting for a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C and clear follow up
preconditions: I can only confirm accounting for a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C and clear follow up if it is the case that A is accounting aligned and the chargeback case A requires follow up and A has the clearing instruction B and A has the merchant account C
effects: Once I confirm accounting for a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C and clear follow up, it is not the case anymore that the chargeback case A requires follow up and it is not the case anymore that A is pending approval

apply_resolution_method.description: apply a resolution method D to a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C
preconditions: I can only apply a resolution method D to a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C if it is the case that the evidence for A is verified and A is accounting aligned and A has the clearing instruction B and A has the merchant account C and A has the auxiliary tag D

I can only apply a resolution method D to a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C if it is not the case that A is pending approval and it is not the case that A is resolution eligible
effects: Once I apply a resolution method D to a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C, it is the case that A is resolution eligible

apply_resolution_with_accounting_policy.description: apply resolution with an accounting policy D to a chargeback case A using a dispute record B and a reason code C
preconditions: I can only apply resolution with an accounting policy D to a chargeback case A using a dispute record B and a reason code C if it is the case that the evidence for A is verified and A is accounting aligned and A has the dispute record B and A has the reason code C and A has the auxiliary tag D
I can only apply resolution with an accounting policy D to a chargeback case A using a dispute record B and a reason code C if it is not the case that A is resolution eligible
effects: Once I apply resolution with an accounting policy D to a chargeback case A using a dispute record B and a reason code C, it is the case that A is resolution eligible and A is pending approval

finalize_case_resolution.description: finalize resolution for a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C
preconditions: I can only finalize resolution for a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C if it is the case that A is resolution eligible and A is pending approval and A has the clearing instruction B and A has the merchant account C
effects: Once I finalize resolution for a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C, it is the case that A is resolved

Once I finalize resolution for a chargeback case A using a clearing instruction B and a merchant account C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending approval and it is not the case anymore that the evidence for A is verified and it is not the case anymore that the chargeback case A requires follow up

collect_evidence_with_approver.description: collect evidence for a chargeback case A using a work item B with an approver C
preconditions: I can only collect evidence for a chargeback case A using a work item B with an approver C if it is the case that A is resolved and A is resolution eligible and A has a match and B is assigned to the chargeback case A and C is available
I can only collect evidence for a chargeback case A using a work item B with an approver C if it is not the case that the evidence for A is verified
effects: Once I collect evidence for a chargeback case A using a work item B with an approver C, it is the case that the evidence for A is verified

record_approver_assignment.description: record approver assignment for a chargeback case A using a work item B
preconditions: I can only record approver assignment for a chargeback case A using a work item B if it is the case that A is resolution eligible and the evidence for A is verified and B is assigned to the chargeback case A
I can only record approver assignment for a chargeback case A using a work item B if it is not the case that A is pending approval and it is not the case that A has an approver recorded
effects: Once I record approver assignment for a chargeback case A using a work item B, it is the case that A has an approver recorded

record_approver_assignment_by_analyst.description: record approver assignment for a chargeback case A by an analyst B
preconditions: I can only record approver assignment for a chargeback case A by an analyst B if it is the case that A is resolution eligible and the evidence for A is verified and B is available
I can only record approver assignment for a chargeback case A by an analyst B if it is not the case that A is pending approval and it is not the case that A has an approver recorded
effects: Once I record approver assignment for a chargeback case A by an analyst B, it is the case that A has an approver recorded
Once I record approver assignment for a chargeback case A by an analyst B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

associate_external_reference_with_case.description: associate an external reference B with a chargeback case A
preconditions: I can only associate an external reference B with a chargeback case A if it is the case that A has an approver recorded and B is available and the chargeback case A allows an external reference link B
effects: Once I associate an external reference B with a chargeback case A, it is the case that A has the external reference candidate B
Once I associate an external reference B with a chargeback case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

cross_reference_external_reference_for_c.description: cross reference an external reference C for closure between an audit case A and an operational case B
preconditions: I can only cross reference an external reference C for closure between an audit case A and an operational case B if it is the case that A is active and A has an audit routing flag and A has an external reference C and B has the external reference candidate C
I can only cross reference an external reference C for closure between an audit case A and an operational case B if it is not the case that A has an external reference C that is validated
effects: Once I cross reference an external reference C for closure between an audit case A and an operational case B, it is the case that A has an external reference C that is validated

record_audit_signoff.description: record audit signoff for a chargeback case A with a work item B by an approver C
preconditions: I can only record audit signoff for a chargeback case A with a work item B by an approver C if it is the case that A is active and A has an audit routing flag and the evidence for A is verified and A has an approver recorded and B is assigned to the chargeback case A and C is available
I can only record audit signoff for a chargeback case A with a work item B by an approver C if it is not the case that A has a recorded audit signoff
effects: Once I record audit signoff for a chargeback case A with a work item B by an approver C, it is the case that A has a recorded audit signoff

close_case_operational.description: close a chargeback case A operationally
preconditions: I can only close a chargeback case A operationally if it is the case that A has an operational routing flag and A is active and A has a match and A is accounting aligned and A is resolution eligible and A has an approver recorded and the evidence for A is verified
I can only close a chargeback case A operationally if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a chargeback case A operationally, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_external_reference.description: close a chargeback case A with an external reference B
preconditions: I can only close a chargeback case A with an external reference B if it is the case that A has an audit routing flag and A is active and A has a match and A is accounting aligned and A is resolution eligible and A has an approver recorded and the evidence for A is verified and A has an external reference B that is validated
I can only close a chargeback case A with an external reference B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a chargeback case A with an external reference B, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_audit_signoff.description: close a chargeback case A with audit signoff
preconditions: I can only close a chargeback case A with audit signoff if it is the case that A has an audit routing flag and A is active and A has a match and A is accounting aligned and A is resolution eligible and A has an approver recorded and the evidence for A is verified and A has a recorded audit signoff
I can only close a chargeback case A with audit signoff if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a chargeback case A with audit signoff, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.link_source_transaction_to_case: link source transaction {?source_transaction} to chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_source_transaction_from_case: unlink source transaction {?source_transaction} from chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_work_item_to_case: assign work item {?work_item} to chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.release_work_item_from_case: release work item {?work_item} from chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.record_investigation_assignment: record investigation assignment for chargeback case {?chargeback_case} with work item {?work_item}
action_nl_templates.assign_analyst_to_case: assign analyst {?analyst} to chargeback case {?chargeback_case} for investigation
action_nl_templates.record_approver_attestation: record attestation from approver {?approver} for work item {?work_item} in chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.record_external_reference_attestation: record attestation for chargeback case {?chargeback_case} using external reference {?external_reference}
action_nl_templates.link_clearing_instruction_to_case: link clearing instruction {?clearing_instruction} to chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_clearing_instruction_from_case: unlink clearing instruction {?clearing_instruction} from chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.link_merchant_account_to_case: link merchant account {?merchant_account} to chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_merchant_account_from_case: unlink merchant account {?merchant_account} from chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.link_dispute_record_to_case: link dispute record {?dispute_record} to chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_dispute_record_from_case: unlink dispute record {?dispute_record} from chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.link_reason_code_to_case: link reason code {?reason_code} to chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_reason_code_from_case: unlink reason code {?reason_code} from chargeback case {?chargeback_case}
action_nl_templates.validate_accounting_alignment_with_batch: validate accounting alignment of chargeback case {?chargeback_case} with accounting batch {?accounting_batch} using clearing instruction {?clearing_instruction} and merchant account {?merchant_account}
action_nl_templates.validate_accounting_with_dispute_and_evi: validate accounting of chargeback case {?chargeback_case} with accounting batch {?accounting_batch}, dispute record {?dispute_record}, and evidence document {?evidence_document}
action_nl_templates.confirm_accounting_and_clear_followup: confirm accounting for chargeback case {?chargeback_case} using clearing instruction {?clearing_instruction} and merchant account {?merchant_account} and clear follow-up
action_nl_templates.apply_resolution_method: apply resolution method {?resolution_method} to chargeback case {?chargeback_case} using clearing instruction {?clearing_instruction} and merchant account {?merchant_account}
action_nl_templates.apply_resolution_with_accounting_policy: apply resolution with accounting policy {?accounting_policy} to chargeback case {?chargeback_case} using dispute record {?dispute_record} and reason code {?reason_code}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a entity is also a object

Everything that is a chargeback case or a source transaction or a accounting batch or a merchant account or a clearing instruction or a dispute record or a work item or a analyst or a external reference or a approver or a evidence document or a reason code or a auxiliary tag is also a entity
Everything that is a resolution method or a accounting policy is also a auxiliary tag
Everything that is a operational case or a audit case is also a chargeback case
